chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-221 OF 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 07.08.2017 Mr. Sajid Soomro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w SIP Haji Manzoor o/b of SHO Jamshoro. = With reference to the order of previous date, statement has been filed on behalf of the respondents No.2 and 3, submitted by Additional A.G, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. As per statement, it is stated that the respondents have neither harassed to the petitioner in past nor have any intention to cause any harassment in future as well. Furthermore, the direction of this Court has already been conveyed to the SHO P.S Jamshoro at Kotri to strictly comply with the direction of this Court in letter and spirit. In view of above statement, this petition is being disposed of with the direction to the respondents to conduct themselves in the matter strictly in accordance with law and they will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. The private respondents are also directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and if they have any grievance against the petitioner, the same shall be redressed through due process of law but not by causing harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Shahid
